description: Settlement Method (SttlmMtd) for pacs.009 ADV must be COVE.
errorMessage: For pacs.009 ADV messages, Settlement Method must be COVE. INDA, INGA, and CLRG are not allowed.
fix: Change <SttlmMtd> to COVE and provide the required reimbursement agent details.

description: Message ID (MsgId) must not be blank.
errorMessage: Message ID (MsgId) cannot be empty or whitespace.
fix: Provide a unique identification for the message.

description: Number of Transactions (NbOfTxs) must be equal to 1 for Advantage messages.
errorMessage: pacs.009 ADV message must contain exactly one transaction.
fix: Set <NbOfTxs> to 1 and ensure only one <CdtTrfTxInf> block is present.

description: Interbank Settlement Amount must be strictly positive.
errorMessage: Settlement amount must be greater than zero.
fix: Enter a positive number for the settlement amount.

description: Currency (Ccy) must be a valid 3-letter uppercase ISO code.
fix: Use a standard 3-letter uppercase ISO currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

description: Date fields must follow ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).
fix: Ensure the date follows the YYYY-MM-DD format.

description: BICFI must be 8 or 11 uppercase alphanumeric characters.
fix: Provide a valid 8 or 11 character Bank Identifier Code.

description: UETR must follow UUID v4 format.
fix: Use a valid UUID v4 for the UETR field.

description: Instruction ID (InstrId) must not be blank and max 16 chars.
fix: Provide a non-blank Instruction ID up to 16 characters.

description: End to End ID must not be blank and max 35 chars.
fix: Provide a non-blank End to End ID up to 35 characters.

description: Combined check for MsgId + UETR duplication.
errorMessage: Duplicate MsgId and UETR combination detected in history.
fix: Ensure the combination of Message ID and UETR is unique for every transaction.
